_readme: Phase 8.6 chart-flavored phrase bank. TEMPLATES + slot vocabulary, expanded by chart-phrase-bank.test.js and run through the REAL chart engine (resolveChartRequest, which since Phase 8.1 routes through the same Step 3 matcher). Each entry: `templates` (with {slot} placeholders), `accept` (outcomes that count as correct: resolved/decline; a stretched resolve is an honest 'ask' and always passes), and `shape` (asserted only when the engine resolves EXACTLY — a mismatch is confident-wrong). Grow this from real successful chart requests each release.

entries.note: average of a numeric column, broken down by a group → a value chart. valueCol Duration_days, aggMode average (the label column varies with the group slot).
a plain count broken down by a group → a count chart (label varies with the group slot).
a most-common / top-N request → a sorted, capped bar of that category.
MUST decline (or ask): you cannot average a TEXT column into a value chart. A confident resolve to average here is confident-wrong.
